entities.name: LAND EQUIVALENT RATIO
entities.description: A metric used to evaluate the efficiency of intercropping compared to sole cropping

entities.name: INTERCROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing two or more crops simultaneously on the same piece of land

entities.name: PURE STAND
entities.description: The practice of growing a single crop alone, also known as sole cropping

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production harvested per unit area

entities.name: EFFECTIVE LER
entities.description: A modified land equivalent ratio used to evaluate yield proportions based on farmer requirements
